title: White Ledge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''White Ledge''', located on [[Torega]], the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Topa]], was a system of deep caverns where a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] could easily be hidden.<ref name="Secrets">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
